sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_eeb9bb2793effe10e502fbf08bba10ab
sys_update_xml.payload:
publictrueglobal.UpdateSetGitExporterfalseExports ServiceNow Update Sets to GitHub as XML files via the GitHub Contents API. Reads update records from sys_update_xml, builds an XML document, and commits it to the configured GitHub repository. Usage: Call exportToGit(updateSetSysId, updateSetName) from Background Script or Business Rule. Related properties: update_set_exporter.github_token / owner / repo / branchfalseUpdateSetGitExporterfalsesys_script_includeadmin2026-03-17 07:53:34eeb9bb2793effe10e502fbf08bba10ab16UpdateSetGitExporterglobalglobalsys_script_include_eeb9bb2793effe10e502fbf08bba10abadmin2026-03-21 04:14:39eeb9bb2793effe10e502fbf08bba10abadmin2026-03-17 07:53:34146a332793effe10e502fbf08bba10822admin2026-03-17 08:09:45sys_script_include
true

sys_update_xml.name: sys_kmf_module_key_policy_00b6a4bb93273250e502fbf08bba1093
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_kmf_module_key_policy"><sys_kmf_module_key_policy action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><crypto_module display_value="sn_pwdreset_ah.password_reset">d41c3789773630100a9bcac5ec5a99e2</crypto_module><key_type display_value="Symmetric Key Encryption Key">ca005cf7c7103300af4d43c6f0976328</key_type><last_enforced>2026-03-17 11:07:08</last_enforced><result>reject</result><sys_class_name>sys_kmf_module_key_policy</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-17 11:07:08</sys_created_on><sys_id>00b6a4bb93273250e502fbf08bba1093</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name/><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_kmf_module_key_policy_00b6a4bb93273250e502fbf08bba1093</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-17 11:07:08</sys_updated_on></sys_kmf_module_key_policy></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_properties_0f28776393effe10e502fbf08bba105b
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_properties"><sys_properties action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><choices/><description>Name of the GitHub repository where Update Set XML files will be committed. 
The repository must already exist and be initialized with at least one commit.
Example: servicenow-update-sets</description><ignore_cache>true</ignore_cache><is_private>false</is_private><name>update_set_exporter.github_repo</name><read_roles/><suffix/><sys_class_name>sys_properties</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-17 07:45:03</sys_created_on><sys_id>0f28776393effe10e502fbf08bba105b</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>update_set_exporter.github_repo</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_properties_0f28776393effe10e502fbf08bba105b</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-17 07:49:06</sys_updated_on><type>string</type><value>servicenow-update-sets</value><write_roles/></sys_properties><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=0f28776393effe10e502fbf08bba105b"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sn_cmdb_ws_ms_class_metadata_ce9f62555bd50110693e7da52d81c7bd
sys_update_xml.payload: 100sn_cmdb_ws_ms_class_metadataadmin2022-01-26 09:01:20globalce9f62555bd50110693e7da52d81c7bd22c8ab76825371201032b7ddeeff7b1280c8ab76825371201032b7ddeeff7b1280sn_cmdb_ws_ms_class_metadata_ce9f62555bd50110693e7da52d81c7bdadmin2026-03-21 06:30:00cmdb_ci_hardware

sys_update_xml.name: sys_properties_6b67772393effe10e502fbf08bba1017
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_properties"><sys_properties action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><choices/><description>Export target platform for Update Set automation. 
Supported values: github, ado. 
Determines which external repository the Update Set XML will be pushed to.</description><ignore_cache>true</ignore_cache><is_private>false</is_private><name>update_set_exporter.target</name><read_roles/><suffix/><sys_class_name>sys_properties</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-17 07:41:52</sys_created_on><sys_id>6b67772393effe10e502fbf08bba1017</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>update_set_exporter.target</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_properties_6b67772393effe10e502fbf08bba1017</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-17 07:46:56</sys_updated_on><type>string</type><value>github</value><write_roles/></sys_properties><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=6b67772393effe10e502fbf08bba1017"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_properties_d2f73f2393effe10e502fbf08bba10ca
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_properties"><sys_properties action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><choices/><description>GitHub username or organization name that owns the target repository. 
Used to construct the GitHub API endpoint URL.
Example: jeannjang</description><ignore_cache>true</ignore_cache><is_private>false</is_private><name>update_set_exporter.github_owner</name><read_roles/><suffix/><sys_class_name>sys_properties</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-17 07:43:50</sys_created_on><sys_id>d2f73f2393effe10e502fbf08bba10ca</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>update_set_exporter.github_owner</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_properties_d2f73f2393effe10e502fbf08bba10ca</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-17 07:48:50</sys_updated_on><type>string</type><value>jeannjang</value><write_roles/></sys_properties><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=d2f73f2393effe10e502fbf08bba10ca"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_properties_dc78772393effe10e502fbf08bba1078
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_properties"><sys_properties action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><choices/><description>Target branch name in the GitHub repository for committing Update Set exports. The branch must already exist. Default: main</description><ignore_cache>true</ignore_cache><is_private>false</is_private><name>update_set_exporter.github_branch</name><read_roles/><suffix/><sys_class_name>sys_properties</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-17 07:46:03</sys_created_on><sys_id>dc78772393effe10e502fbf08bba1078</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>update_set_exporter.github_branch</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_properties_dc78772393effe10e502fbf08bba1078</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-17 07:49:17</sys_updated_on><type>string</type><value>main</value><write_roles/></sys_properties><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=dc78772393effe10e502fbf08bba1078"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_kmf_module_crypto_spec_8c2cb789773630100a9bcac5ec5a99b1
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_kmf_module_crypto_spec"><sys_kmf_module_crypto_spec action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><algorithm display_value="AES 256 GCM">6d2e9e9553013300cd1eddeeff7b1224</algorithm><alias>password_reset --- Symmetric Key Wrapping/Unwrapping</alias><auto_generate_key>true</auto_generate_key><crypto_module display_value="sn_pwdreset_ah.password_reset">d41c3789773630100a9bcac5ec5a99e2</crypto_module><crypto_purpose display_value="Symmetric Key Wrapping/Unwrapping">243e7b64c7003300af4d43c6f09763de</crypto_purpose><download_wrapping_key/><enroll_module_for_resource_exchange>false</enroll_module_for_resource_exchange><generate_key>1230c3bb0bc83300af4deaf1a3673a8a</generate_key><import_key_from_keystore>0b0e5336c7003300af4d43c6f0976315</import_key_from_keystore><integrity_preserving>false</integrity_preserving><key_alias/><key_type display_value="Symmetric Key Encryption Key">ca005cf7c7103300af4d43c6f0976328</key_type><key_version>-1</key_version><origin>servicenow</origin><sn_kmf_state>key_creation</sn_kmf_state><sys_class_name>sys_kmf_module_crypto_spec</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2021-09-23 13:20:08</sys_created_on><sys_id>8c2cb789773630100a9bcac5ec5a99b1</sys_id><sys_mod_count>4</sys_mod_count><sys_name>password_reset --- Symmetric Key Wrapping/Unwrapping</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Password Reset flows" source="sn_pwdreset_ah">61a9cb3ddb162300314873568c9619bf</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Password Reset flows">61a9cb3ddb162300314873568c9619bf</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_kmf_module_crypto_spec_8c2cb789773630100a9bcac5ec5a99b1</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-17 11:07:09</sys_updated_on><upload_csk>a4bff7d453010010cd1eddeeff7b12b0</upload_csk></sys_kmf_module_crypto_spec></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_properties_3dc73baf93affe10e502fbf08bba1047
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_properties"><sys_properties action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><choices/><description>GitHub Personal Access Token (classic) used for authenticating API requests. 
Requires 'repo' scope. Stored encrypted as password2. 
Do not share or expose the value.</description><ignore_cache>true</ignore_cache><is_private>false</is_private><name>update_set_exporter.github_token</name><read_roles/><suffix/><sys_class_name>sys_properties</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-03-17 07:43:00</sys_created_on><sys_id>3dc73baf93affe10e502fbf08bba1047</sys_id><sys_mod_count>2</sys_mod_count><sys_name>update_set_exporter.github_token</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_properties_3dc73baf93affe10e502fbf08bba1047</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-03-17 07:48:18</sys_updated_on><type>password2</type><value>)pR#e1BThptrkB+TJ40avPKtQAyWOXjv46oLLIWZiRAkCVsBHOrETU4mHxFHqchtDo+uaSyQuyD9df7YGHp26zVmqeqkt3qOhqp+hlTFzGuPoXg=</value><write_roles/></sys_properties><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=3dc73baf93affe10e502fbf08bba1047"/></record_update>
